adapters.name: mcp_search_adapter
adapters.mock_mode: deterministic offline mock when neither provider is configured

adapters.name: mcp_extract_adapter
adapters.mock_mode: deterministic offline mock when network/parsing libraries are unavailable

orchestrator.name: mcp_orchestrator
orchestrator.role: auth passthrough + request logging only, no routing logic

deployment.note: Each adapter can run in-process (default, no infra required) or as its own Dockerized MCP server (architecture.md §7), reached over HTTP via mcp_orchestrator. Self-heals to in-process if the server is unreachable.

tool_count_budget.note: Keep each adapter well under 10-15 tools (Haiku-class accuracy threshold) / 20-30 (Sonnet-class). Split into a new Domain-Specific Adapter instead of growing an existing one.
